options.text: It is unconsciousness caused by Nitrogen can lead to death
It is unconsciousness caused by Inert gas can lead to death
Nitrogen, which is non-flammable, non-toxic and colourless
Nitrogen which is undetectable to the human senses

explanation: Nitrogen asphyxiation occurs when nitrogen displaces oxygen in an enclosed space, leading to an oxygen-deficient atmosphere that can cause unconsciousness or death due to hypoxia.
